meaning: n.古罗马城镇的广场(或市场),论坛,法庭,讨论会
examples: The forum is now open to all budding entrepreneurs.
The quarterly had been a forum for sound academic debate.
Members of the council agreed that was an important forum for discussion.
From behind here is a view of the entire Roman Forum, the powerhouse of the Empire.
Well, an organisation called Founders Forum has come up with a clever and amusing method.
